new_classes.label_en: Semi-sparkling wine other than that of subheading 2204 10, in containers > 2 l and ≤ 10 l (CN 2204 22 10)
new_classes.label_de: Perlwein (kein Schaumwein i.S. Unterposition 2204 10), in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l bis einschließlich 10 l (KN 2204 22 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes other than sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10, presented either in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar measured at a temperature of 20 °C, packaged in containers holding more than 2 litres and up to and including 10 litres.
Packaging whose Volume quality has a value of more than 2 litres and at most 10 litres, corresponding to the container size range defined for CN subheading 2204 22.

coverage_explanation:
The main discriminating criteria from the legal text are captured:
1. Wine other than sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10 — modelled via complement restriction on SparklingWineQuality and ChampagneSparklingWineProduction, and via the WineFreshGrapesProduction restriction.
2. Either in bottles with mushroom stoppers (MushroomStopperBottlePackaging exists in TBox) OR with excess pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C — the pressure range is encoded as decimalRange restrictions on hasExcessPressureAtTwentyDegrees; the mushroom-stopper bottle variant is described by SemiSparklingWineQuality (which covers both presentations as an equivalent quality).
3. Container volume > 2 L and ≤ 10 L — modelled via the new MediumContainer2To10L class.

Partial gap: The 'OR' logic between (a) mushroom-stopper bottle and (b) CO₂ pressure presentation cannot be expressed as a single OWL intersection without a union; the axioms encode the pressure criterion which is the chemically definitive condition, and the mushroom stopper criterion is considered a presentation equivalent captured by SemiSparklingWineQuality. The existing SemiSparklingWineQuality class already covers '≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C'. The MushroomStopperBottlePackaging class exists in the TBox but expressing a disjunctive OR would require owl:unionOf which is not directly supported in the restriction schema — this reduces coverage to 0.85.
